title: putoria brevifolia var. tenella
intro: Putoria brevifolia var. tenella, also known as Putoria tenella, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae. It is a small shrub native to Asia, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Putoria tenella include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and improve immune function. Putoria tenella is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is traditionally used in traditional medicine in some Asian countries.
